user_intent_summary: Identify flights departing from Albania that have associated anomalies or alarms.

datasets.name: allarmi_raw
datasets.rationale: Filters for flights departing from Albania with alarm occurrences. Groups by departure airport and month to detect monthly anomalies per route. Uses tot_voli as the metric to monitor for unusual counts.

datasets.name: tipologia_raw
datasets.rationale: Filters for travelers departing from Albania with control outcomes indicating anomalies. Groups by departure airport and month to detect monthly anomalies per route. Uses allarmati as the metric to monitor for unusual counts.
